text: Arriving in this bright, modern space, I feel a subtle disorientation—as if entering a threshold between the familiar and the experimental. The neon blue glow and the bold R+D on the wall invite curiosity. I sense the energy of innovation—possibility hangs in the air like an electric charge. The gentle hum of machinery and the thoughtful text describing uncertainty and optimism draw me inward. Here, my mind stirs with contemplation and anticipation, eager to see how human creativity and technology connect. I feel both grounded and uplifted, as if I’m standing at the edge of something about to unfold.
